basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of National Institute of Technology Rourkela. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female applicants; 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer)

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. / M.E. / Bachelor's degree (B.Tech / B.E.) or M.Sc
qualification.details: M.Tech. / M.E. / Integrated ME/M.Tech or 4-year Bachelor's degree (B.Tech / B.E.) with a first-class(or equivalent CGPA) in chemical engineering or allied disciplines or M.Sc. in Chemistry, Physics, Biophysics, Bioinformatics, or Biochemistry from a recognized University or Institute with a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET( including Lectureship) score.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000.00/- per month for Year 1 & 2; Rs. 42,000.00/- per month for Year 3

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Tech./M.E./Integrated ME/M.Tech or a 4-year B.Tech/B.E. degree in chemical engineering or allied disciplines, or an M.Sc. in relevant science subjects with a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST, Women) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
